overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with a glowing headband and distinctive pink leg warmers walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character navigates covered walkways, crosses streets at signalized intersections, and passes commercial storefronts while other pedestrians and futuristic vehicles move through the dense urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with colorful commercial buildings

events.description: character turns left at street corner to follow pedestrian

agents.ego_description: walking along city sidewalk following a pedestrian wearing a blue jacket and shorts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue jacket walking ahead of ego toward covered walkway

entered.detail: tall blue building with multiple windows and geometric facade
bright yellow building with red trim visible down the street
large building with red-tinted glass facade and structural beams
tall metal street lamp with glowing light at top
green neon sign reading 'Horris & Company' on building wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an open city sidewalk at night, passing colorful futuristic buildings illuminated by street lamps and neon signs. The camera follows from behind as the character turns a corner and approaches a pedestrian in a blue jacket, moving toward the entrance of a covered walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass

events.description: entering covered walkway beneath overpass with concrete pillars and neon ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: walking under covered overpass alongside other pedestrians with vehicles visible on street to the right

entered.detail: concrete overpass ceiling with linear fluorescent and neon lighting fixtures
large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure
large green neon arrow sign pointing left mounted on wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway beneath a massive overpass, where artificial neon lighting replaces the open sky. Concrete pillars line the left side while the street with sparse traffic runs along the right. The environment shifts from open to sheltered as the character continues walking forward.

events.description: character stops at crosswalk to wait for walking signal
walking signal changes to green and character begins crossing the street
character finishes crossing and steps onto opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at crosswalk signal then crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing waiting at crosswalk signal
pedestrian crossing the street alongside ego character

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped crosswalk with 'X WALK' text markings
vertical traffic light showing red stop signal then green walk
concrete stairwell leading up to overpass on left side

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a signalized crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes, waiting for the light to change. As the signal turns green, the character crosses the street alongside other pedestrians, passing under the overpass structure toward a commercial area with bright shop fronts visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial arcade with food vendors and neon storefronts

events.description: entering commercial area with bright purple and green neon shop fronts

agents.ego_description: walking past neon-lit shop fronts including a burrito stand and various commercial displays

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near shop entrance looking at display

entered.detail: storefront with bright purple neon lighting and digital displays
storefront with green neon trim and large glass windows
red neon sign reading 'BURRITO' above food vendor stall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered commercial sidewalk lined with vibrant neon storefronts in purple and green. Passing a burrito stand with bright red signage, the character continues through the arcade-like space with other pedestrians browsing the shops.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner crosswalk with heavy red neon lighting

events.description: character stops at street corner to wait for traffic to clear
futuristic black vehicle drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: standing at crosswalk waiting for vehicles to pass before crossing

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving down the street past the crosswalk

entered.detail: large building facade with intense red neon lighting and structural details
bright street lamp creating lens flare effect in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a street corner illuminated by intense red neon lighting from a large building on the right. Standing at the crosswalk, the character waits as a futuristic vehicle drives past, with the camera focused on the traffic and the glowing street scene ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from an open night sidewalk into a sheltered commercial district. It begins by following the character past colorful buildings and street lamps before turning a corner toward the entrance of a covered walkway. As the character moves beneath a massive overpass, the open sky is replaced by artificial neon lighting and concrete pillars, leading the camera toward a signalized crosswalk with bold yellow stripes. The scene then expands into a vibrant commercial area as the character crosses the street and walks past purple and green storefronts and a red burrito stand. Finally, the movement concludes at a street corner bathed in intense red neon light, where the camera lingers on a passing futuristic vehicle and the glowing urban landscape ahead.
